titleStmt.title: SII 36.111: original edition by P Shanmugam
No. 111. (A.R. No. 111 of 1910.) TIRUMĀḶAM (Kōviltirumāḷam), NANNILAM TALUK, TANJORE DISTRICT. On the north wall of the first prākāra in the Māgāḷēśvara temple.

p.hi: Kulōttuṅga III. Year 17 and 249th day: A.D. 1196.

summary.p: Records, that after a proper enquiry, an order of Vāṇādhirājan and Nuḷambādhirājan issued for the restoration of a piece of land as tirunāmattukkāṇi to the temple of Mudupagavar at Ambar in Ambar-nāḍu, a subdivision of Uyyakkoṇḍār-vaḷanāḍu. It was stated that the disputed land was said to have been purchased by Rācavallavap Pallavaraiyar of Chiṟuvēḷūr and later returned to the temple by a release document (viḍutīṭṭu). The order was communicated by the officer Tirumandira-ōlai Rājēndrasiṅga Mūvēndavēḷāṉ and others to the authorities of the temple.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī tribhuvanaccakravatti koṉerimeṉ koṇṭāṉ Uyyakkoṇṭār vaḷanāṭṭu Ampar nāṭṭu Ampar mutupakavar koyilil patipātamūlappaṭṭuṭaip pañcācāriyat tevarkaṉmikkum śrīmāheśvarak kaṇkāṇi ceyvārkaḷukkum śrīkāriyam ceyvāṉukkum Ittevar tirunāmattukkāṇi Ūṟkaḷile Āṟe ciṉṉa nilattai ciṟu veḷūṟuṭaiyān Araiyan peru
yān Irācavallavap pallavaraiyan rājarājap peruvilai koṇṭeṉeṉṟu Anupavittuvantavāṟe Innilam Ittevar tirunāmattukkāṇiyānapaṭikku sātaṉaṅ koṇṭu Ikkoyiṟ tāṉattārum ciṟuveḷūruṭaiyān Irācavallavap pallavaraiyan taṉakku kāṇiyānapaṭikku sātanaṅ koṇṭu Ivanum vecālip
paraiyan keṭkiṟa Ārācciyile E ppaṭa Itu keṭṭa Iṭattu Irāca vallavap pallavaraiyanukku vaḻakkiṉṟiye I rattoṉṟum pinpum Ittoṭaic cenṟu nilaippaṭiye nammuṭankaḷattu paṭṭarkaḷomuṅ kūṭa vāṇāthirājanum nuḷampāthirājanum Iṭattu Innilam ciṟuveḷūruṭaiyān Irācava
llavap pallavaraiyanukkup pirāna ṟiye Iruntateṉṟum Ippaṭiyākaiyāle Ivan Innilam viṭṭu Ik koyil tāṉattāṟku viṭutiṭṭuk kuṭuttāṉeṉṟum Innilam paḻampaṭiye Ittevar tirunāmattukkāṇiyāy Anupavikkavum Ippaṭikku Ikkoyilile kaṭavatākap peṟaveṇumenṟum vāṇāthirā
janum nuḷampāthirājanum namakkuc connamaiyil Ippaṭic ceyyakkaṭavatākac connom Innilam patineḻāvatu pacāṉmutal paḻampaṭiye Ittevar tirunāmattuk kāṇiyākak kaikkoṇṭu Anupavikkavum Ippaṭikku Ikkoyilile kalveṭṭavum paṇṇuka Eḻutiṉāṉ tirumantiraōlai Irācentiraciṅka mūventaveḷān Eḻuta kurukula
rācanum Ama kkaṅ ka num nikarilicoḻap pallavaraiyanum pūlōka purantarap pallavaraiyanum Eḻuttiṭṭup patiṉeḻāvatu nāḷ Irunūṟṟu nāṟpat toṉpatiṉāl prasātañ ceytaruḷiṉa tirumukappaṭi ... §
Digital edition of SII 36.111 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
